2603.17504.title: Inducing Epistemological Humility in Large Language Models: A Targeted SFT Approach to Reducing Hallucination
2603.17504.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) often hallucinate, producing fluent but false information, partly because supervised fine-tuning (SFT) implicitly rewards always responding. We introduce $\textit{HypoTermInstruct}$, an SFT dataset (31,487 responses for 11,151 questions) designed to teach models epistemological humility-the ability to recognize the limits of their own knowledge and admit uncertainty. This is achieved through questions about non-existent "hypothetical" terms. We also release $\textit{HypoTermQA-Enhanced}$, a benchmark for hallucination tendency strengthened through multiple validations. We conducted 800 controlled LoRA SFT runs across $\textit{Llama3.1-8B}$ and $\textit{Gemma3-4B}$ (base and instruct), testing 100 fine-tuning configurations with paired controls. Our results demonstrate that replacing generic instruction data with $\textit{HypoTermInstruct}$ significantly improves the HypoTerm Score (median increases of 0.19% to 25.91%) and FactScore (+0.39% to +0.86%), while maintaining stable performance on MMLU (minimal decreases of 0.26% to 0.35%). Our work demonstrates that targeted, high-quality SFT data teaching meta-cognitive skills can effectively reduce hallucination without preference/RL pipelines, providing mechanistic insights and a practical path toward more reliable AI systems.
2603.17504.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）經常會出現幻覺，產生流暢但虛假的資訊，部分原因是監督式微調（SFT）隱含地獎勵總是回應。我們介紹了 $\textit{HypoTermInstruct}$，這是一個 SFT 數據集（31,487 個回應對應 11,151 個問題），旨在教導模型認識認識論的謙遜——識別自身知識的局限性並承認不確定性。這是通過關於不存在的「假設」術語的問題來實現的。我們還發布了 $\textit{HypoTermQA-Enhanced}$，這是一個通過多次驗證強化的幻覺傾向基準。我們在 $\textit{Llama3.1-8B}$ 和 $\textit{Gemma3-4B}$（基礎和指令）上進行了 800 次控制的 LoRA SFT 執行，測試了 100 種微調配置及其配對控制。我們的結果顯示，用 $\textit{HypoTermInstruct}$ 替換通用指令數據顯著提高了 HypoTerm 分數（中位數增加 0.19% 到 25.91%）和 FactScore（+0.39% 到 +0.86%），同時在 MMLU 上保持穩定的表現（最小下降 0.26% 到 0.35%）。我們的工作表明，針對性的高質量 SFT 數據教導元認知技能可以有效減少幻覺，而無需偏好/RL 管道，提供了機制上的見解和通向更可靠 AI 系統的實用途徑。
2603.17504.author: Cem Uluoglakci et.al.
